abstract: Mathematical and computer-science algorithms for converting Sketch files into pixel-perfect React + CSS code. 46 rules across 8 categories ordered by cascade impact: from the iteration strategy and regression-gate mental model, through tree reconstruction, layout inference (flex/grid/freeform), geometry, visual-regression diffing (SSIM, pHash, pixelmatch), to style/typography/path translation. The skill is designed for AI agents building or improving design-to-code pipelines and emphasizes regression-safe incremental improvement.
